params.name: Feast of the Gods
params.description: The Feast of the Gods is the last painting completed by Giovanni before his death. The painting is inspired by verses from the poet Ovid's feast, depicting a lazy gathering of the Olympian gods on a summer afternoon, where the fertility god Priapus attempts to assault the sleeping nymph Lotis, but the goddess is awakened by the braying of a donkey, causing the fertility god to be publicly humiliated. The characters in the painting are vividly portrayed, with bright colors, and the deep green for …
